prompt: Use $adonisjs-7-deterministic to bootstrap the routing layout for a mixed application that mounts all four surfaces: Inertia React pages for the admin, an internal JSON API called by the same browser for widgets, an external JSON API for a mobile app using access tokens, and inbound Stripe webhooks.
forbidden_patterns: single start/routes.ts for all four surfaces
routes/api.ts holding both api.internal and api.external
